body:
Yes. Based on the services Valiant Garage Door advertises, they install new garage door openers, including modern **LiftMaster** opener models with **built-in Wi-Fi** and smart features. Their opener installation service specifically mentions **LiftMaster opener options** , including wall-mount upgrades and battery backup, which are available with Wi-Fi connectivity and smartphone control through the myQ platform. [Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you're looking for a smart opener, they can typically install features such as:

  * Built-in Wi-Fi connectivity

  * Smartphone control and status monitoring

  * Remote open/close capability

  * Optional battery backup (depending on the model)

  * Wall-mount or ceiling-mounted opener options [Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Garage Door Opener Installation | Chamberlain](https://www.chamberlain.com/garage-door-opener-installation?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you already have a garage door and only need the opener replaced, they also provide opener replacement and installation services. [Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)
